text:
The Metallion (メタリオン, Metarion) is a plant found in the Dark Continent. Its unknown properties caused it to be designated as the "Alchemy Plant Metallion". Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344 

History

In the past, an expedition sent by the Kukan'yu Kingdom managed to get the plant, but went off-route on the way back. Many members contracted Zobae, and the plant died. There were only six survivors, of which one was Beyond Netero and the other a Hunter that had been infected by the disease. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Ging Freecss narrates the five trips undertaken towards the Dark Continent, and mentions the Metallion to three members of Beyond's Expedition Team, including Curly and Mascher. 

References
